name: Cold Logic
effect: +10% base Physicality to all Null-Forged.

name: Void Stare
effect: +5% Authority to Backline proxies.

name: Rusty Joints
effect: Enemies start combat with -5% Grace.

name: Metallic Plating
effect: +5% Physicality (Armor) to Frontline proxies.

name: Calculated Strikes
effect: +5% Acumen to all proxies.

name: Dark Matter Reserves
effect: +10% Capacity (MP) to all Null-Forged.

name: Inevitability
effect: Decay effects deal +10% damage.

name: Hollow Frame
effect: +5% Fate (Dodge) against Physical Attacks.

name: Sensor Calibration
effect: +5% Grace (Hit Chance) against high-Dodge enemies.

name: Coolant Leak
effect: Enemies hitting your Frontline lose 2% Grace.

name: Executioner's Eye
effect: +10% Critical Multiplier against enemies below 50% HP.

name: Synthetic Blood
effect: Bleed effects deal 50% less damage to Null-Forged.

name: Entropy Protocol
effect: DoT (Decay) effects last 1 additional turn.

name: Synthetic Armor
effect: Frontline proxies ignore the first physical attack of the battle.

name: Dark Matter Core
effect: Killing an enemy grants +10 MP (Capacity) to the killer.

name: Shadow-Step
effect: Backline proxies gain +20% Fate (Dodge) on the first turn.

name: Reaper's Toll
effect: Physical attacks heal the user for 5% of the damage dealt to enemies with Decay.

name: Overclocked Actuators
effect: Null-Forged gain +10% Grace when below 30% HP.

name: Null-Zone
effect: The first Spiritual Attack from an enemy is automatically resisted.

name: Vulture Protocol
effect: When an ally dies, all living Null-Forged gain +25% Physicality for 2 turns.

name: Reanimator's Grace
effect: The first time a proxy dies, resurrect them with 25% HP.

name: Zero Kelvin
effect: Crits applied to enemies afflicted by a debuff deal +50% Acumen multiplier.

name: Singularity Drive
effect: Enemies killed by Void-Borgs cannot trigger on-death effects.

name: Absolute Decay
effect: Decay now also reduces enemy Physicality (Armor) by 10% per tick.

name: Ghost in the Machine
effect: Null-Forged cannot be critically hit.

name: The Flesh is Weak
effect: All healing received is reduced by 50%, but base Physicality is doubled.

name: Absolute Zero
effect: Once per combat, instantly execute any non-boss enemy below 30% HP.

name: Heat Death
effect: All DoT effects deal damage at the start AND end of a turn.

name: Event Horizon
effect: Enemies that miss an attack lose their next turn entirely.

name: The Great Silence
effect: For the first 2 turns of combat, enemies cannot use Spiritual (Magic) attacks.

name: Rigid Doctrine
effect: +10% base Spirit to all Lumina.

name: Clockwork Steps
effect: +5% Grace to all proxies.

name: Heavy Gravity
effect: Enemy Dodge (Fate) reduced by 10%.

name: Shield Wall
effect: +10% Physical Resistance to Frontline.

name: True Aim
effect: +5% Spiritual Hit Chance (Acumen) to all proxies.

name: Magnetic Pull
effect: Taunt effects last 1 additional turn.

name: Honor Bound
effect: Proxies deal +5% damage to full-health enemies.

name: Dogmatic Will
effect: +10% Debuff Resistance to all Lumina.

name: Weighted Dice
effect: Fate (Crit Chance) increased by 5%.

name: Vanguard's Light
effect: Frontline proxies gain +5% max HP.

name: Inquisitor's Zeal
effect: +5% Authority against shielded enemies.

name: Temporal Echo
effect: +5% chance to retain MP when casting a skill.

name: Magnetic Field
effect: Frontline shares 20% of damage taken with the backline.

name: Absolute Truth
effect: Attacks that hit automatically bypass 10% of enemy Physicality/Spirit.

name: Chrono-Lock
effect: Enemies cannot act before your fastest proxy on the first turn.

name: Grav-Well
effect: Enemies delayed on the timeline take 10% more damage from the next attack.

name: Paladin's Oath
effect: Healing a proxy to full HP grants them a 10% Physicality shield.

name: Stalwart Defense
effect: Proxies with a shield cannot be critically hit.

name: Momentum
effect: Every time a proxy acts, their Grace increases by 2% (stacking).

name: Verdict
effect: Hitting an enemy with 3 different proxies in one round inflicts Stun.

name: Chrono-Shift
effect: Moving a unit back on the timeline also heals them for 10% max HP.

name: Impenetrable Aegis
effect: Shields absorb Spiritual damage as well as Physical damage.

name: The Scales Tip
effect: If an ally's HP falls below 20%, their next attack deals True (Unmitigable) damage.

name: Perfect Symmetry
effect: If the Frontline and Backline have the exact same combined HP percentages, all stats are boosted by 15%.

name: Magnetic Resonance
effect: When a shield breaks, it deals its value as Spiritual damage to the attacker.

name: Time-Dilation
effect: Your proxies' buffs last 1 extra turn; enemy debuffs last 1 extra turn.

name: The Grand Cathedral
effect: Start every battle with a shield on all proxies equal to 50% of their Max HP.

name: Absolute Decree
effect: Once per combat, instantly strip all buffs from all enemies and all debuffs from all allies.

name: Singularity
effect: All damage dealt by your team is calculated against the enemy's lowest defensive stat.

name: Rewind
effect: Once per run, if your party wipes, restart the battle from Turn 1 with full HP.

name: Volatile Spark
effect: +10% base Acumen to all Espers.

name: Shifting Winds
effect: +5% Dodge (Fate) to all proxies.

name: Sparking Embers
effect: +5% Authority to all proxies.

name: Fluid Stance
effect: +5% Grace after dodging an attack.

name: Earthen Core
effect: +10% Physicality to Geomancers.

name: Kindling
effect: Burn damage increased by 10%.

name: Refreshing Waters
effect: Healing skills cost 10% less MP.

name: Static Charge
effect: +5% Critical Strike Chance.

name: Unpredictable Nature
effect: +10% Destiny (Meta-stat for events).

name: Whirlwind
effect: Multi-hit skills have a 5% chance to add one extra strike.

name: Magma Veins
effect: Espers gain +5% max HP.

name: Thermal Shock
effect: Enemies afflicted by Burn have -5% Spirit.

name: Wild Magic
effect: Spiritual attacks have a 20% chance to cast twice.

name: Scorched Earth
effect: Enemies that attack a frontline proxy suffer Burn.

name: Riptide
effect: Healing a target also advances their position on the timeline by 5%.

name: Stone Skin
effect: The first physical attack taken by each proxy is reduced by 50%.

name: Gale Force
effect: Dodging an attack grants +20% Acumen to the next Spiritual attack.

name: Chain Lightning
effect: Critical hits splash 20% of their damage to a random adjacent enemy.

name: Volcanic Eruption
effect: When an Esper dies, they deal massive Fire damage to all enemies.

name: Unstable Elements
effect: Every turn, one random enemy loses 20% Spirit.

name: Elemental Roulette
effect: Every turn, one random proxy gains +100% Damage for that turn only.

name: Geothermic Core
effect: Burn effects now heal your Frontline for 50% of the damage dealt.

name: Tidal Wave
effect: Cleansing a debuff from an ally heals the entire party for 15% Max HP.

name: Eye of the Storm
effect: If a proxy dodges 3 attacks in one combat, they gain 100% Crit Chance for 2 turns.

name: Primal Resonance
effect: Having all four elements (Fire, Earth, Water, Air) in your party grants +20% to all stats.

name: Wildfire
effect: Burn effects spread to one random enemy at the end of each turn.

name: Primal Big Bang
effect: Crits now hit all enemies for 50% of the damage dealt.

name: Avatar of Chaos
effect: At the start of combat, one random proxy becomes immune to all damage for 3 turns.

name: Maelstrom Unleashed
effect: All multi-hit skills are guaranteed to hit their maximum number of strikes.

name: World Breaker
effect: Spiritual Attacks ignore 100% of enemy Spirit (Resistance).

name: Deep Roots
effect: +10% base HP (Capacity) to all Sylvan.

name: Benevolence
effect: Healing effects increased by 15%.

name: Spore Cloud
effect: +5% Debuff Resist to all proxies.

name: Photosynthesis
effect: Proxies heal 2% Max HP at the start of their turn.

name: Blood Tithe
effect: +5% Physicality to Blood-Druids.

name: Dreamers' Haze
effect: +5% Acumen to Backline proxies.

name: Vitality Spores
effect: Max HP increased by 5% for all proxies.

name: Empathy
effect: When the Frontline takes damage, the Backline gains +2% Authority.

name: Thick Bark
effect: +5% Physical Resistance to Sylvan.

name: Lullaby
effect: Sleep effects are 10% more likely to land.

name: Growth Spurt
effect: Buffs applied by your team are 10% stronger.

name: Symbiont
effect: +5% Fate (Crit Chance) for Sylvan.

name: Symbiotic Link
effect: When a proxy is healed, the healer gains 50% of that healing.

name: Dream State
effect: Sleep effects applied to enemies last an extra turn and lower their Spirit.

name: Blood Magic
effect: Skills that cost HP to cast deal 20% more damage.

name: Verdant Shield
effect: Over-healing is converted into a temporary physical shield.

name: Nurturing Touch
effect: Resurrected proxies return with 50% HP instead of the default amount.

name: Psychic Web
effect: If one proxy dodges an attack, the whole team gains +10% Dodge for 1 turn.

name: Thorn Armor
effect: Enemies attacking with Physical attacks take 10% of the damage back.

name: Flesh Mend
effect: Cleansing a debuff restores 10% of the target's Max HP.

name: Overgrowth
effect: Healing a proxy past max HP converts the excess into permanent Physicality for that combat.

name: Sanguine Harvest
effect: Killing an enemy restores 10% HP to the entire party.

name: Lucid Dreaming
effect: Enemies asleep take 50% more damage from the attack that wakes them up.

name: World-Tree Roots
effect: Frontline proxies cannot be moved or delayed on the timeline by enemies.

name: Flesh Sculptor
effect: When a Sylvan drops below 20% HP, their stats are completely randomized (can only increase).

name: Blossom
effect: At the start of Turn 4, all dead proxies are revived with 10% HP.

name: The World Tree
effect: All proxies regenerate 15% of their Max HP at the start of their turn.

name: Unconditional Love
effect: Any attack that would kill a proxy leaves them at 1 HP instead (Once per proxy per combat).

name: Genesis
effect: Max HP of all proxies is doubled, but damage output is reduced by 20%.

name: Hive Mind
effect: All damage taken is distributed evenly among all four proxies.
